case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. KAREN FERREIRA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, KAREN DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2018
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042463) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERREIRA, KAREN $3,576.94 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,817.94, SEE SCANNED DOC
